Language

🇳🇱 NL 🇬🇧 EN

Your webshop, in any language, in minutes.

ShopVirge builds your multilingual webshop or portfolio — no code, no hassle. Describe your products once, and we'll handle the rest.

Start free → See examples

Everything you need to grow

From automatic translations to payment integrations — ShopVirge handles it.

Automatic multilingual

Your entire site gets translated automatically. You choose which languages.

Live in under an hour

From concept to live site in less than an hour. No technical knowledge needed.

Payment platforms built-in

iDEAL, PayPal, credit card — all integrated, no plugins.

Mobile-first design

Perfect on phone, tablet and desktop. Optimized for conversion.

No design skills needed

Professional-looking websites out of the box with ready-made templates.

Analytics built-in

Track visitors, conversions and product performance. No external tools.

View all features →

How it works

1

Tell us what you sell

Describe your products or services. Upload photos. Give us the basics.

2

We translate everything

Choose your languages and ShopVirge automatically translates your entire site.

3

Go live

Publish with one click. From that moment on, your multilingual shop runs.

Simple pricing

No surprises. Pay for what you use.
